text: Here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity tinged with unease. The angled architecture and dim lighting evoke a feeling of unfamiliarity, almost as if I am venturing into a realm not entirely meant for human presence. Yet, as I observe the R+D wall, the invitation to explore the nuances of human-machine interaction provides a thread of purpose. In this slightly disorienting, futuristic space, I feel like both an observer and a participant in an unfolding experiment about consciousness and technological coexistence.
